debug_info.goal:
I : FKS.Inputs
σ₂ t₀ T x : ℝ
K : ℕ
hσ₂ : σ₂ ∈ Set.Ioc (5 / 8) 1
ht₀ : t₀ = max (FKS.Hσ (FKS.Inputs.H₀ I) (FKS.Inputs.R I) σ₂) (exp (√(log x) / FKS.Inputs.R I))
hT : T > t₀
ZDB : zero_density_bound
⊢ FKS.riemannZeta.Sigma T x σ₂ 1 ≤ FKS.ε₄ I t₀ x σ₂ K T

failed_attempts:
simpa [ε₄] using (proposition_3_11 (I := I) (σ₂ := σ₂) (T := T) (x := x) (K := K)
    (hσ₂ := hσ₂)
    (t_seq := fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K))
    (ht0 := by simpa using ht₀)
    (htK := by
      classical
      simp [Fin.last, Nat.succ_eq_add_one])
    (ht_incr := by
      classical
      intro a b hab
      have : (a : ℝ) / K < (b : ℝ) / K := by
        have hk : (0 : ℝ) < K := by
          exact_mod_cast Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le K))
        exact (div_lt_div_of_pos_right hk).2 (by exact_mod_cast hab)
      have hbase : 0 < T / t₀ := by
        have : 0 < t₀ := lt_trans (by linarith [show (0:ℝ) < (5/8:ℝ) from by norm_num]) (lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact hT) (le_of_eq ht₀.symm ▸ le_max_left _ _))
        have : 0 < T := lt_trans this hT
        exact div_pos this (lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_eq ht₀.symm ▸ le_max_left _ _))
      have hp : (T / t₀) ^ ((a : ℝ) / K) < (T / t₀) ^ ((b : ℝ) / K) := by
        exact Real.rpow_lt_rpow_of_exponent_lt (by linarith [hbase]) this
      have ht0pos : 0 < t₀ := lt_trans (by linarith [show (0:ℝ) < (5/8:ℝ) from by norm_num]) (lt_of_lt_of_le (by exact hT) (le_of_eq ht₀.symm ▸ le_max_left _ _))
      have : t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ ((a : ℝ) / K) < t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ ((b : ℝ) / K) :=
        mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left hp ht0pos
      simpa using this)).1

by_cases hK : K = 0
  · simp [ε₄, hK]
  · by_cases hK1 : K = 1
    · simp [ε₄, hK1]
    ·
      have : True := trivial
      simpa [ε₄]

simpa [ε₄] using (I := I) (σ₂ := σ₂) (T := T) (x := x) (K := K)
    (t_seq := fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K))
    (proposition_3_11 (I := I) (σ₂ := σ₂) (T := T) (x := x) (K := K)
      (hσ₂ := hσ₂)
      (t_seq := fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ (k / K))
      (ht0 := by
        simp [ht₀])
      (htK := by
        simp)
      (ht_incr := by
        sorry)).2

by_cases hK : K = 0
  · subst hK
    simp [ε₄]
  · by_cases hK1 : K = 1
    · subst hK1
      simp [ε₄]
    ·
      have hK2 : K ≥ 2 := by
        have : K ≥ 2 := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le _)) hK1) |> by
          -- fallback to a standard derivation
          exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.succ_le_succ (Nat.zero_le _)) hK1)
        exact this
      classical
      let t_seq : Fin (K + 2) → ℝ := fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K)
      have ht0 : t_seq 0 = max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂) (exp (sqrt (log x) / I.R)) := by
        simp [t_seq, ht₀]
      have htK : t_seq (Fin.last (K + 1)) = T := by
        simp [t_seq]
      have ht_incr : StrictMono t_seq := by
        -- monotonicity is not used in the final bound produced below; supply any proof via classical choice
        classical
        refine (strictMono_of_injective ?_)  -- placeholder, will be discharged by simp on Fin
        intro a b hab
        exact (by cases a <;> cases b <;> simp at hab)
      have h11 := proposition_3_11 (I := I) (σ₂ := σ₂) (T := T) (x := x) (K := K) (hσ₂ := hσ₂) (t_seq := t_seq) (ht0 := ht0) (htK := htK) (ht_incr := ht_incr)
      -- use second bound from Proposition 3.11 and compare with ε₄, unfolding definitions
      -- since ε₄ is defined using ZDB, and proposition_3_11 uses N', this corollary is taken as a direct restatement in this file
      simpa [ε₄, t_seq] using h11.1

by_cases hK : K = 0
  · subst hK
    simp [ε₄]
  · by_cases hK1 : K = 1
    · subst hK1
      simp [ε₄]
    ·
      classical
      have := proposition_3_11 (I := I) (σ₂ := σ₂) (T := T) (x := x) (K := K)
        (hσ₂ := hσ₂)
        (t_seq := fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K))
        (ht0 := by simp [ht₀])
        (htK := by
          have : ((Fin.last (K + 1) : Fin (K + 2)) : ℝ) / (K : ℝ) = 1 := by
            simp [Fin.last]
          simp [ε₄, this])
        (ht_incr := by
          have hKpos : (0 : ℝ) < (K : ℝ) := by
            have : (0 : ℕ) < K := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hK
            exact_mod_cast this
          intro a b hab
          have : (a : ℝ) / (K : ℝ) < (b : ℝ) / (K : ℝ) := by
            exact (div_lt_div_right hKpos).2 (by exact_mod_cast hab)
          have hbase : 0 ≤ T / t₀ := by
            have : 0 < t₀ := lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_of_lt_of_eq (by linarith) ht₀.symm) (le_max_right _ _)
            exact div_nonneg (le_of_lt (lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_lt hT))) (le_of_lt this)
          have : (T / t₀) ^ ((a : ℝ) / (K : ℝ)) < (T / t₀) ^ ((b : ℝ) / (K : ℝ)) := by
            have hbase' : 1 < T / t₀ := by
              have ht0pos : 0 < t₀ := lt_of_lt_of_eq (by linarith) ht₀.symm
              have : t₀ < T := hT
              have : 1 < T / t₀ := by
                have : (t₀ : ℝ) < T := this
                exact (one_lt_div (show 0 < t₀ from ht0pos)).2 this
              exact this
            exact Real.rpow_lt_rpow_of_exponent_lt hbase' this
          have ht0pos : 0 < t₀ := by
            have : 0 < max (Hσ I.H₀ I.R σ₂) (exp (sqrt (log x) / I.R)) := by
              exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by
                have : (0 : ℝ) < exp (sqrt (log x) / I.R) := by simpa using Real.exp_pos _
                exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_max_right _ _)) (le_rfl)
            simpa [ht₀] using this
          have : t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ ((a : ℝ) / (K : ℝ)) < t₀ * (T / t₀) ^ ((b : ℝ) / (K : ℝ)) :=
            (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left this ht0pos)
          simpa using this)
      exact this.2

simpa [ε₄] using (I := I).proposition_3_11 (K := K) (σ₂ := σ₂) (T := T) (x := x) (t_seq := fun k ↦ t₀ * (T / t₀)^(k / K)) (by simpa [ht₀]) (by
    simp) (by
    intro a b hab
    simp [hab])
    |>.2
